titleStmt.title: Shotaku Tei Dosh(o) Unpo-zan shi — early rubbing of Zheng Daozhao's Mount Yunfeng poem (rubbing)
初拓鄭道昭雲峯山詩（拓本）

msIdentifier.repository: Japan Search (ジャパンサーチ) — national aggregator

msContents.summary: Ink rubbing of a Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 (Tei Dōshō) Daoist cliff inscription: Shotaku Tei Dosh(o) Unpo-zan shi — early rubbing of Zheng Daozhao's Mount Yunfeng poem. Holding institution: Edo-Tokyo Museum / Tokyo Museum Collection (ToMuCo) 東京都江戸東京博物館, via Japan Search. Record page verified HTTP 200, but page is JS-rendered and exposed no direct image or IIIF manifest in fetched HTML; classified record-only.

support.objectType: 拓片 · ink rubbing on paper

origin.origDate: Catalogued as 20th-c. modern (近代) holding; an early/first-pull (初拓) rubbing of the Northern Wei Yunfengshan poem

bibl.ref: Japan Search (ジャパンサーチ) — national aggregator — record

revisionDesc.change: Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 (Tei Dōshō) Daoist cliff inscription; harvested from Japan Search (ジャパンサーチ) — national aggregator via the Epiwen Japanese-repository workflow. Provenance-only (no public IIIF image).

div.p: Ink rubbing — see the linked record/manifest.
